ns0:entry.ns0:title: Huanshere/VideoLingo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Huanshere/VideoLingo
Language: python
Netflix-level subtitle cutting, translation, alignment, and even dubbing - one-click fully automated AI video subtitle team | Netflix级字幕切割、翻译、对齐、甚至加上配音，一键全自动视频搬运AI字幕组

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LMCache/LMCache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LMCache/LMCache
Language: python
Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
Language: python
A unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques like quantization, pruning, distillation, speculative decoding, etc. It compresses deep learning models for downstream deployment frameworks like TensorRT-LLM, TensorRT, vLLM, etc. to optimize inference speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Language: python
The agent that grows with you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBMB/ChatDev
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBMB/ChatDev
Language: python
ChatDev 2.0: Dev All through LLM-powered Multi-Agent Collaboration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
Language: python
Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: allenai/OLMo-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/allenai/OLMo-core
Language: python
PyTorch building blocks for the OLMo ecosystem

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-research/timesfm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-research/timesfm
Language: python
TimesFM (Time Series Foundation Model) is a pretrained time-series foundation model developed by Google Research for time-series forecasting.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: luongnv89/claude-howto
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/luongnv89/claude-howto
Language: python
A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/agent-framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-framework
Language: python
A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sansan0/TrendRadar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sansan0/TrendRadar
Language: python
⭐AI-driven public opinion & trend monitor with multi-platform aggregation, RSS, and smart alerts.🎯 告别信息过载，你的 AI 舆情监控助手与热点筛选工具！聚合多平台热点 + RSS 订阅，支持关键词精准筛选。AI 智能筛选新闻 + AI 翻译 + AI 分析简报直推手机，也支持接入 MCP 架构，赋能 AI 自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测等。支持 Docker ，数据本地/云端自持。集成微信/飞书/钉钉/Telegram/邮件/ntfy/bark/slack 等渠道智能推送。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sherlock-project/sherlock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sherlock-project/sherlock
Language: python
Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yusufkaraaslan/Skill_Seekers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yusufkaraaslan/Skill_Seekers
Language: python
Convert documentation websites, GitHub repositories, and PDFs into Claude AI skills with automatic conflict detection
